description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a metallic blue-gray back panel and a prominent triple-lens camera array in the upper left corner. The back also displays a centered, reflective Apple logo, indicating it is an iPhone model. The front is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge display with minimal bezels and a small notch at the top for sensors and the front-facing camera. The sides are flat and metallic, with subtle button placements visible along the edges. The device appears thin and lightweight, with a glossy finish on both the front and back surfaces. No external case or cover is present, and the phone's design emphasizes minimalism and premium materials.
description: A sleek, blue-gray iPhone with a triple-lens camera array, edge-to-edge display, and metallic flat sides. The Apple logo is centered on the glossy back.
description_view_0: The back view shows a metallic blue-gray surface with a centered Apple logo and a prominent triple camera array in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: The left edge view reveals the phone's slim profile and flat metallic side, with subtle button placements visible.
description_view_2: The front view displays the large, edge-to-edge screen with a dark blue wallpaper and a small notch at the top.
description_view_3: The right edge view highlights the thinness of the device and the slight protrusion of the camera bump.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back panel, reflective and clearly visible.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a dark blue wallpaper with intersecting light blue lines and no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array located in the upper left corner on the back, arranged in a triangular pattern with a flash and sensor module.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are subtly visible on the left and right edges, likely including a volume rocker and power button.
